name: SOCi P0
description:
SOCi Product Overview 

SOCi is a versatile platform for social media and reputation management, catering specifically to multi-location businesses and agencies. It consolidates social media scheduling, content management, and engagement, along with reputation monitoring and local SEO optimization. Businesses prefer SOCi for its centralized control, scalability across multiple locations, real-time reputation management capabilities, analytics for informed decision-making, and comprehensive support services making it an essential tool for amplifying their impact. 

Features of SOCi

  • Has a publisher network of major industry players such as Google, Apple Maps, Facebook, Yelp, and more.
  • Has a comprehensive social media management platform that lets you publish, manage, and analyze your social content across major social networks.
  • With SOCi Genius Social, one can access curated content calendars, AI-organized workflows, the unified brand voice across all platforms, and more. 
  • SOCi Genius Search helps you maintain relevant business listings throughout all the locations, navigate the complexities, and get automated recommendations tailored for every location. 
  • Comes with actionable insights and analytics to help understand your listing's performance better
  • Helps streamline Google Q&A management at scale with location-specific dynamic text and bulk publishing
  • Establish connections locally with the help of search-optimized, branded local pages and store locators on your website.
  • SOCi Genius Reviews automatically aggregates and responds to all your reviews making sure that the brand tonality is on point.
  • Helps businesses build tailored surveys with pre-built templates and fully customizable ones to engage with their customers better 
  • Track and compare your ad spend for regions and individual locations
  • Provides actionable and real-time insights across all solutions
  • SOCi chat is an AI-powered omnichannel chatbot that is present at every location
  • Helps reduce time to conversion by providing location-specific content like store events, special offers, appointment bookings, and convenient ordering experiences.

Pros

✅Has voice-search capabilities, in-car navigation, map, nav, and directory assistance

✅Provides real-time insights 

Cons

❌Has certain glitches when posting content to social media around formatting which can be time-consuming for the user

❌Limited image editing capabilities 

❌Can’t make alterations to specific posts for specific channels while bulk posting 

❌Does not offer the ability to upload Facebook/ Instagram reels directly from the dashboard 

❌Comes with limited third-party integrations 

Pricing Module

SOCi is not very transparent with its pricing module and is known to offer custom pricing options. However, users seem to be bothered about their pricing plans telling them to re-consider it for smaller businesses. 

‍
